tracks.rawText: 4:10Driving Playlistv5.5Psychedelic dark rock with detuned fuzz guitars, phaser-drenched leads, and a pulsing minor-key bass riff locked to tom-heavy drums, Tape echo, rotary speaker blur, and gritty overdrive create a claustrophobic haze, while eerie organ swells and feedback drones intensify the trance-like, unsettling texturePublishRemix

tracks.rawText: 0:38Demeter - Pulse [1654834323]_074v5.5CoverNu-disco groove at 124 BPM in G minor with a prominent slap bass line using thumb-slap and finger-pop articulation, syncopated muted electric guitar scratches, four-on-the-floor kick, crisp off-beat open hi-hats, tight snare, and backbeat handclaps, Bright staccato brass stabs hit the upbeat, with a filtered synth pad and high-pass sweeps in a clean, modern mixPublishRemix
